ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user profile was created */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "friends" INTEGER /* Number of friends the user has */,
  "favourites" INTEGER /* Number of posts the user has favorited */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user's profile is verified */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "platforms" TEXT /* List of social media platforms the user is active on */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language used by the user */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the post was made */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* List of hashtags used in the post */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the post */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the post has received */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites the post has received */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the post is a retweet */,
  "post_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the post */,
  "post_url" TEXT /* URL of the post */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the post */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location associated with the post */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score of the post */,
  "engagement_score" TEXT /* Overall engagement score of the post */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post contains sensitive content */,
  "post_privacy" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the post */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., retweet, favorite) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the engagement */,
  "engagement_score" TEXT /* Score of the engagement */,
  "is_positive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the engagement is positive */,
  "engagement_context" TEXT /* Context of the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "trend_status" TEXT /* Trend status of the hashtag */,
  "popularity_score" TEXT /* Popularity score of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Twitter Web App, smcapplication) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source */,
  "source_version" TEXT /* Version of the source application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being retweeted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who retweeted the post */,
  "retweet_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the retweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been retweeted */,
  "retweet_context" TEXT /* Context of the retweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being favorited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who favorited the post */,
  "favorite_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the favorite */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been favorited */,
  "favorite_context" TEXT /* Context of the favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "comment_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the comment */,
  "comment_url" TEXT /* URL of the comment */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score of the comment */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment contains sensitive content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post where the user was mentioned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was mentioned */,
  "mention_context" TEXT /* Context of the mention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of media */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the media is attached to */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media */,
  "media_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the media */,
  "media_size" INTEGER /* Size of the media file in bytes */,
  "media_format" TEXT /* Format of the media */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)
